title: CreateBarters
description: A small but great datapack that adds create mod trades to piglins.
body:
![partner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ced4f8898b6ba459f0ba60247deb04ffc01fd1db_0.webp)
#
# CreateBarters by HellDamn Studios

**CreateBarters** is a Minecraft datapack that integrates the **Create Mod** into Piglin bartering! Now, trading with Piglins for gold ingots gives you access to useful items and components from the Create Mod, enriching your gameplay experience in the Nether.
#
Want an realiable server to play this modpack with friend?: then choose [Wabbanode](https://wabbanode.com/affiliate/essentialscreate)!
![partner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/494b17f610635fb6e69591bd185758ac8892662a.png)

#
## Features
- Piglins will barter a variety of Create Mod items, including:
  - **Basic Components**
    - Cogwheels (2-5)
    - Shafts (1-4)
    - Andesite Alloy (2-4)
    - Brass Casings (1-2)
    - Andesite Casings (1-2)
    - Copper Ingots (2-5)
    - Brass Ingots (2-4)
    - Zinc Ingots (2-4)
    - Copper Sheets (1-4)
    - Brass Sheets (1-4)

  - **Mechanical Components**
    - Mechanical Bearings (1-2)
    - Mechanical Saws (1)
    - Mechanical Pistons (1-2)
    - Mechanical Arms (1)
    - Mechanical Pulleys (1)
    - Mechanical Mixers (1)
    - Mechanical Rollers (1)
    - Mechanical Presses (1)

  - **Advanced Machinery**
    - Mechanical Crafters (1)
    - Mechanical Drills (1)
    - Mechanical Harvesters (1)
    - Mechanical Ploughs (1)
    - Precision Mechanisms (1)
    - Rotation Speed Controllers (1)

  - **Power Generation**
    - Water Wheels (1-2)
    - Windmill Bearings (1)

  - **Transport & Processing**
    - Smart Chutes (1)
    - Brass Tunnels (1-2)
    - Filters (1)

This datapack adds new, thematic trades that blend seamlessly into Minecraft's Nether bartering system, enhancing progression without breaking balance. The items are carefully weighted to ensure a balanced progression system, with basic components being more common and advanced machinery being rarer.

## Installation
1. Download the datapack file and place it in your world's `datapacks` folder.
2. Run `/reload` in-game to activate the datapack.
3. Start trading with Piglins using gold ingots and enjoy the Create Mod loot!

## Compatibility
- **Minecraft Version**: 1.16.5 or higher
- **Create Mod**: Required (latest version recommended)
- **Pack Format**: 6 (compatible with 1.16.x and newer versions)
- Fully compatible with other datapacks that don't override Piglin bartering.

## Version Support
- **Tested Versions**:
  - Minecraft 1.16.5
  - Minecraft 1.17.x
  - Minecraft 1.18.x
  - Minecraft 1.19.x
  - Minecraft 1.20.x
- **Create Mod Versions**: Works with Create Mod 0.3.0 and newer

## Credits
Created by **HellDamn Studios**. Inspired by the need for more rewarding bartering options in the Nether!
